text: A photograph of a commercial building facade. The building has a pink upper section and a yellow lower section. A brown metal spiral staircase leads up to a blue-painted balcony. A large, closed, brown corrugated metal roll-down shutter covers the main entrance. A small white control box is mounted on the pink wall next to the shutter. A light blue scooter is parked in front of the shutter. To the right, a partially open blue roll-down shutter reveals a storage area filled with colorful plastic bags and materials. The left side shows a dark interior space with shelves and hanging items.
